Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''project/src/i18n/locales/es/dashboard.json'',''utf8''\)\); const m = d.studentDashboard.myApplicationStep; console.log\(''details:'', JSON.stringify\(m.details, null, 2\)\); console.log\(''documentRequests at studentDashboard level:'', !!d.studentDashboard.documentRequests\); console.log\(''documentRequests inside myApplicationStep:'', !!m.documentRequests\); console.log\(''identityVerification at studentDashboard level:'', !!d.studentDashboard.identityVerification\); console.log\(''identityVerification inside myApplicationStep:'', !!m.identityVerification\);")
